title: Audio Generation & Transcription Flow
audio_generation_flow: START: Caller invokes AudioProvider::audio(text, voice='default-female', instructions=null, model=null, timeout=30)
Resolve model: model = model ?? defaultAudioModel() [ElevenLabsProvider default: 'eleven_multilingual_v2']
Create AudioPrompt(text, voice, instructions, provider, model, timeout)
Dispatch GeneratingAudio(invocationId, provider, model, prompt) via events
ElevenLabsGateway::generateAudio(provider, model, text, voice, instructions, timeout) called
HTTP POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voice} with xi-api-key header, body: {model_id, text}
BRANCH: withErrorHandling wraps the HTTP call (HandlesFailoverErrors trait handles errors)
Dispatch AudioGenerated(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response) via events
transcription_flow: START: Caller invokes TranscriptionProvider::transcribe(audio: TranscribableAudio, language=null, diarize=false, model=null)
Resolve model: model = model ?? defaultTranscriptionModel() [ElevenLabsProvider default: 'scribe_v2']
Create TranscriptionPrompt(audio, language, diarize, provider, model, timeout)
Dispatch GeneratingTranscription(invocationId, provider, model, prompt) via events
ElevenLabsGateway::generateTranscription(provider, model, audio, language, diarize, timeout) called
HTTP POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/speech-to-text with xi-api-key header, file attachment, body: {model_id, language, diarize}
BRANCH diarize=true: map response['words'] filtering type='word' → TranscriptionSegment(text, speaker_id, start, end)
Return TranscriptionResponse(response['text'], Collection<TranscriptionSegment>, Usage, Meta(providerName, model))
Dispatch TranscriptionGenerated(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response) via events

AudioProvider: audio(text, voice, instructions, model, timeout): AudioResponse
AudioGateway: generateAudio(AudioProvider, model, text, voice, instructions, timeout): AudioResponse
TranscriptionGateway: generateTranscription(TranscriptionProvider, model, TranscribableAudio, language, diarize, timeout): TranscriptionResponse

key_relationships: ElevenLabsProvider extends Provider, implements AudioProvider + TranscriptionProvider
ElevenLabsProvider uses traits: GeneratesAudio, GeneratesTranscriptions, HasAudioGateway, HasTranscriptionGateway
AudioGenerated event carries: invocationId, Provider, model, AudioPrompt, AudioResponse
TranscriptionSegment implements Arrayable + JsonSerializable; fields: text, speaker, startSeconds, endSeconds
branching_conditions: Ai::audioIsFaked() → record prompt for testing (no HTTP call in fake mode)
Ai::transcriptionsAreFaked() → record prompt for testing (no HTTP call in fake mode)
voice alias matching: 'default-male'|'default-female' → ElevenLabs voice ID, else pass raw voice ID
diarize=true → parse response['words'], filter type='word', map to TranscriptionSegments
ElevenLabsGateway uses HandlesFailoverErrors trait → wraps HTTP calls in withErrorHandling(providerName, fn)

api_endpoints.STT: POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/speech-to-text  multipart: file attachment + {model_id, language, diarize}

important_notes: Both pipelines are symmetric: resolve model → create prompt → optional fake recording → dispatch 'Generating' event → call gateway → dispatch 'Generated' event → return response. ElevenLabsGateway is the single concrete implementation for both TTS and STT in this project. Default TTS model: eleven_multilingual_v2. Default STT model: scribe_v2. Auth via 'xi-api-key' header from providerCredentials()['key'].
